name: South Dakota
address: 500 East Capitol Avenue, Suite 204, Pierre, SD 57501-5070

steps: Vote to dissolve the LLC according to the operating agreement or by majority member consent
Wind up business affairs and settle all debts and obligations
File final tax returns with the South Dakota Department of Revenue if applicable
File Articles of Termination with the South Dakota Secretary of State
Cancel any licenses, permits, and registrations
Close business bank accounts and cancel your EIN with the IRS
llc.notes: South Dakota has no state income tax. The filing fee is $10. Expedited processing is available for an additional $50.

steps: Hold a board of directors meeting to recommend dissolution
Obtain shareholder approval for the dissolution
Wind up business affairs and settle all debts and obligations
File final tax returns with the South Dakota Department of Revenue if applicable
File Articles of Dissolution with the South Dakota Secretary of State
Cancel any licenses, permits, and registrations
Close business bank accounts and cancel your EIN with the IRS
corporation.notes: South Dakota has no state income tax. The filing fee is $10. Expedited processing is available for an additional $50.

tax.notes: South Dakota has no state income tax and no corporate income tax. No tax clearance certificate is required for dissolution. Businesses may still need to file final sales tax or other applicable tax returns.

requirements.publicationDetails: Corporations must publish notice of dissolution one time in a newspaper of general circulation in the county of the principal office (SDCL 47-1A-1407).
requirements.employeeNotification: Must provide WARN Act notice (60 days) if 100+ employees
requirements.creditorNotification: Must notify known creditors of the dissolution and provide a deadline for claims
requirements.registeredAgentNotes: Registered agent designation terminates upon dissolution filing
requirements.boardOrMemberApproval: LLC: Majority member vote or as specified in operating agreement. Corporation: Board resolution followed by shareholder approval.

includes: Every required form with direct download links
